mapper.select: SELECT DOC_TYP, FROM_STS, ACTION, TO_STS, ACTION_NM, DIRECTION, RSN_REQ_YN, SORT_NO FROM CM_STATUS_FLOW WHERE DOC_TYP = #{docTyp} AND FROM_STS = #{fromSts} AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY SORT_NO

SELECT DOC_TYP, FROM_STS, ACTION, TO_STS, ACTION_NM, DIRECTION, RSN_REQ_YN, SORT_NO FROM CM_STATUS_FLOW WHERE DOC_TYP = #{docTyp} AND FROM_STS = #{fromSts} AND ACTION = #{action} AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND DEL_YN = 'N'
SELECT NVL(MAX(SEQ), 0) + 1 FROM LOG_DOC_STATUS_HIS WHERE DOC_TYP = #{docTyp} AND DOC_ID = #{docId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LOG_DOC_STATUS_HIS (DOC_TYP, DOC_ID, DOC_NO, SEQ, FROM_STS, TO_STS, ACTION, ACTION_NM, ACTOR_ID, RSN) VALUES (#{docTyp}, #{docId}, #{docNo}, #{seq}, #{fromSts}, #{toSts}, #{action}, #{actionNm}, #{actorId}, #{rsn})
mapper.select: SELECT ID, DOC_TYP, DOC_ID, DOC_NO, SEQ, FROM_STS, TO_STS, ACTION, ACTION_NM, ACTOR_ID, TO_CHAR(ACTION_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS ACTION_DT, RSN FROM LOG_DOC_STATUS_HIS WHERE DOC_TYP = #{docTyp} AND DOC_ID = #{docId} ORDER BY SEQ
